prompt: An open textbook with the index page visible in the back. The index entries have database column names instead of topics (email: page 42, major: page 87). An arrow connects an index entry to the right page. Label: 'Same idea, different scale'.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. An open textbook with the index page visible in the back. The index entries have database column names instead of topics (email: page 42, major: page 87). An arrow connects an index entry to the right page. Label: 'Same idea, different scale'. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
